description: Implements a sliding window guard for search actions.
Returns False if the number of active timestamps exceeds the limit.
Returns True if the number of active timestamps does not exceed the limit.
Filters timestamps based on a cutoff value using list comprehension.
Returns (False, 0) when the limit of active timestamps is exceeded.
Returns (True, remaining limit) when the limit of active timestamps is not exceeded.
Calculates the length of the 'active' list to check if it exceeds the limit.
Calculates the remaining limit by subtracting the length of 'active' list from the total limit.
